name: skill-checker
description: Security checker for Claude Code skills - detect injection, malicious code, and supply chain risks before installation

scripts.test:fixtures: node bin/skill-checker.js scan tests/fixtures/safe-skill --format json | node -e "const r=JSON.parse(require('fs').readFileSync('/dev/stdin','utf8'));if(r.grade!=='A'||r.score!==100)process.exit(1)" && node bin/skill-checker.js scan tests/fixtures/malicious-skill --format json | node -e "const r=JSON.parse(require('fs').readFileSync('/dev/stdin','utf8'));if(r.grade!=='F'||r.summary.total<19||r.summary.critical<11)process.exit(1)"
scripts.prepublishOnly: npm run lint && npm run build && npm run test:coverage && npm audit --omit=dev && npm run test:fixtures

author: Alexander Jin
